executive_summary: Build failure analysis for scib_demo repository on main branch. Critical configuration error detected: GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) not found or inaccessible. All 3 build attempts failed with HTTP 404 errors when attempting to dispatch the workflow. This prevents any Maven build execution from occurring.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404 Not Found when attempting to trigger the build.yml workflow. This indicates that the .github/workflows/build.yml file does not exist in the repository or is not accessible with the current permissions.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={
errors.root_cause: The GitHub Actions workflow file is missing from the repository at the expected path .github/workflows/build.yml, or the GitHub token lacks sufficient permissions to access/trigger workflows, or GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No Maven builds can be executed until the workflow file is created or permissions are corrected. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment.

errors.title: Empty Action URL in Build Failure Logs
errors.description: All build failure attempt logs contain empty action_url fields, confirming that no GitHub Actions workflow runs were created. This is a consequence of the workflow dispatch failure.
errors.error_message: action_url field is empty string in build_failure_attempt-1.json, build_failure_attempt-2.json, and build_failure_attempt-3.json
errors.root_cause: Workflow dispatch API call failed before creating a workflow run, resulting in no action URL being generated.
errors.impact: Unable to retrieve detailed build logs from GitHub Actions API. No workflow run exists to analyze for Maven-specific errors.

errors.title: Repeated Build Attempts Without Resolution
errors.description: Three consecutive build attempts (attempt-1, attempt-2, attempt-3) all failed with identical HTTP 404 errors, indicating the underlying configuration issue was not resolved between attempts.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure (attempt 3 of 3)
errors.root_cause: Automated retry mechanism attempted to dispatch workflow without first verifying or creating the required workflow file.
errors.impact: Wasted build resources and time on repeated failed attempts. Indicates need for pre-flight validation before workflow dispatch.

recommended_fixes.title: Create GitHub Actions Workflow File
recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file with proper Maven build configuration.
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Use GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create .github/workflows/build.yml with standard Maven build steps (checkout, setup-java, maven build, test, package).
recommended_fixes.validation: Verify workflow file exists at .github/workflows/build.yml and is valid YAML syntax.

recommended_fixes.title: Verify GitHub Token Permissions
recommended_fixes.description: Ensure the GitHub token has 'workflow' and 'actions:write' permissions to dispatch workflows.
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Check token scopes via GitHub API: GET /user with Authorization header. Verify 'workflow' scope is present.
recommended_fixes.validation: Confirm token has required permissions and can successfully dispatch workflows.

recommended_fixes.title: Implement Pre-Flight Validation
recommended_fixes.description: Add validation step before workflow dispatch to check if workflow file exists and is accessible.
recommended_fixes.automated_action: Before dispatching workflow, call GitHub API to verify .github/workflows/build.yml exists: GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/contents/.github/workflows/build.yml
recommended_fixes.validation: Pre-flight check returns HTTP 200 and file content before attempting workflow dispatch.

findings: CRITICAL: Missing required CI/CD workflow file violates DevOps best practices
HIGH: Lack of pre-flight validation resulted in 3 failed attempts without resolution
MEDIUM: Empty action URLs prevent proper audit trail and log analysis
recommendations: Implement workflow file existence validation before dispatch
Add automated workflow file creation for new repositories
Enhance error handling to detect and report missing workflow files immediately
